title: Mojtaba Khamenei selected as Supreme Leader
description: Assembly of Experts selects Mojtaba Khamenei as third Supreme Leader. IRGC pledges total obedience. Dynastic succession.

title: Trump threatens Mojtaba assassination
description: Trump on ABC: new leader must get approval from us or not going to last long.

title: Oil breaches $100/barrel
description: Brent $108.68 (+18%), WTI $108.33 (+19%). First >100 since 2022. Goldman warns $150 possible.

title: Kuwait declares force majeure on crude
description: First Gulf state to formally declare. 20M bbl/day removed from market.

title: Wave 28 — new generation missiles
description: IRGC launches Wave 28 with new generation missiles targeting Beer Sheva, Tel Aviv, Al-Azraq (Jordan). Contradicts gen 1-2 claim.

title: State Dept orders diplomats out of Saudi Arabia
Saudi ultimatum to Iran
description: Reuters 4 sources: continued attacks -> retaliation + US base access. Dual message.

title: Macron speaks with Trump and Pezeshkian
description: First Western leader to engage both sides. Visiting Cyprus Monday.

title: 7th US service member KIA
description: Died from wounds from Saudi Arabia March 1 attack.

title: IDF kills Babaian — Supreme Leader military secretary
description: Second person in role killed. IRGC Aerospace HQ destroyed.

title: IRIS Dena — 104 killed confirmed
description: Iranian army reveals 104 killed, 32 wounded in US submarine attack March 4.
